item.title: Australia Entry #22 - November 8th, 2025 - December 24th, 2025
item.description: Images and Videos Images Here Okay… I’m late It’s currently March 29th when I am starting to write this post in my notebook, and I’m recognized that I’ve really fallen behind on my blogging.

item.title: Australia Entry #11 - October 23rd, 2024 - October 31st, 2024
item.description: Images and Videos Images Here Singapore for Work Busy, busy, busy.
